## Acceptance criteria touched

- [ ] Typecheck passes
- [ ] Lint passes (incl. `pnpm lint:i18n`)
- [ ] Unit coverage ≥ 80% for changed files in `shared` / `web/src/lib`
- [ ] Storybook stories updated where components changed
- [ ] Critical-flow E2E updated where flows changed
- [ ] Lighthouse impact (if any) understood and acceptable
- [ ] RTL parity verified on every changed screen
- [ ] AAA contrast verified on child surface; AA on caregiver surface
- [ ] No third-party tracking of child input added
- [ ] AI cost guard not bypassed
- [ ] Translations: every Arabic string is either real or marked `TODO(translate)` and listed in `docs/translation-review.md`
